class.name: E3DResourceFormatLoader
class.brief_description: Resource loader for MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] model files.
class.description: [E3DResourceFormatLoader] integrates MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] files with Godot's resource loading pipeline. It recognizes the [code]e3d[/code] extension, opens the source file, and delegates parsing to [E3DParser] to return an [E3DModel] resource.
